concept: Camping: Where adulting meets nature’s chaos.
title: Funny Camping Adulting Shirt - Campfire Chaos and Survival Humor
description:
Camping: the ultimate test of adulthood and survival instincts. One minute you're basking in the glow of your campfire masterpiece, the next you're swatting mosquitos the size of small drones. This witty design captures the wild, wonderful chaos of escaping adult responsibilities only to discover Mother Nature has her own plans. 

Perfect for: 
- Outdoorsy types with a sense of humor 
- Campers who see the beauty (and bugs) in roughing it 
- Nature lovers who survive on coffee and campfire pizza 

DETAILS: 
- Bold typography paired with cheeky camping icons 
- Design works on all your favorite colors—light or dark 
- Made-to-order with top-notch print quality

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
